title: sticherus squamosus
intro: Sticherus squamosus, also known as the scaly club moss or scaly spike moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Sticherus squamosus is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
